name: cool-workflow
description: Auditable workflow control-plane and orchestration runtime: TypeScript dispatch, evidence-gated verification, state commits, scheduling, routines, multi-agent coordination, and MCP. Delegates execution to external agents — never runs models.

interface.longDescription: Cool Workflow (CW) is an auditable workflow control-plane and orchestration runtime. It provides a TypeScript COL runtime, Workflow App framework contracts, Router/Orchestrator, Subagent Dispatch, Deterministic Harness, Adversarial Verifier, Git/State Commit, Sandbox Profiles, scheduled tasks, routine triggers, a high-level Multi-Agent CLI/MCP host surface, and an MCP JSON-RPC 2.0 bridge. Developers write reusable workflow apps; CW delegates execution to an external agent host and records verified, replayable state — it never embeds a model API.
defaultPrompt: Use Cool Workflow to plan this as phases and agents.
Run the architecture review workflow with CW.
Create a reusable CW workflow for this task.
